meta.title: Founder Members | MMTUK
meta.description: Welcome to the MMTUK Founder Members directory. Exclusive content, reports and events for our founding supporters.

hero.heading: Founder Members
hero.subtitle: Thank you for being among the first to invest in MMTUK's mission. This is your home for exclusive content, reports and events.

items.title: Quarterly Progress Reports
items.description: Detailed updates on MMTUK's impact, research output and organisational growth, delivered directly to you every three months.

items.title: Private Meetings & Briefings
items.description: Exclusive access to private meetings and briefings with MMTUK's steering group and invited speakers.

items.title: Early Access Content
items.description: Be the first to see event recordings, transcripts and research papers before they are published publicly.

items.title: Founding Recognition
items.description: Your support is acknowledged as part of the pioneering group who made MMTUK's launch possible.

cta.heading: Become a Founder Member
cta.description: Join the founding group of supporters building the UK's leading MMT advocacy organisation. The founder member offer of 100 days ends 17 May 2026.
